title.name: title
title.default: 'AMJ Produce | Premium Wholesale Fresh Produce – South Australia'

description.name: description
description.default: 'Premium wholesale fresh produce supplier based in South Australia. Supplying chefs, restaurants, and caterers with the finest local and specialty produce.'

sub_paragraph.name: sub_paragraph
sub_paragraph.default: 'Delivering the finest local and specialty produce to chefs, restaurants, caterers, and corporate kitchens across South Australia.'

lead_paragraph.name: lead_paragraph
lead_paragraph.default: 'AMJ Produce Co, led by Chris and Margy Abbot, is a premium wholesale fresh produce supplier based in Pooraka, South Australia. We''re dedicated to delivering the freshest, highest-quality produce to the region''s finest kitchens.'

body1.name: body1
body1.default: 'AMJ Produce is an Award winning, well-established wholesale produce vendor and a strong supporter of South Australian Agriculture. Fresh fruits and vegetables are at the heart of healthy eating.'

body2.name: body2
body2.default: 'The driving force behind AMJ Produce is a proactive commitment to deliver fresh produce to the doorstep of our customers when they need them.'

body3.name: body3
body3.default: 'Our strong relationships with local growers and trusted importers mean we can consistently source what chefs and caterers need — from everyday staples to rare, hard-to-find specialty ingredients and exquisite edible flowers.'

body.name: body
body.default: 'AMJ Produce is fully integrated with Fresho — the leading fresh produce ordering platform trusted by chefs and hospitality businesses across Australia. Browse our current stock, place orders, track deliveries and manage invoices all in one place.'

lead_paragraph.name: lead_paragraph
lead_paragraph.default: 'We understand that timing is everything in a professional kitchen. AMJ Produce is committed to reliable, early-morning delivery so your team has what they need before service begins.'

mission_intro.name: mission_intro
mission_intro.default: 'AMJ Produce is committed to delivering the highest quality wholesale fresh produce to our customers. We achieve this through:'

vision_body.name: vision_body
vision_body.default: 'To be South Australia''s most trusted and preferred wholesale fresh produce supplier, renowned for uncompromising quality, reliability, and our deep commitment to supporting local growers and sustainable practices.'

intro_paragraph.name: intro_paragraph
intro_paragraph.default: 'We''re committed to minimising our ecological footprint while supporting the local produce industry. Our warehouse incorporates sustainable practices from energy efficiency to waste management.'

body1.name: body1
body1.default: 'We understand that in a professional kitchen, quality and consistency aren''t optional — they''re everything. That''s why every order from AMJ Produce comes with our personal commitment to freshness, accuracy, and service excellence.'

body2.name: body2
body2.default: 'Whether you''re a head chef at a fine-dining restaurant, a catering manager for a major event, or a corporate kitchen buyer, we treat every customer with the same dedication and care.'

sub_paragraph.name: sub_paragraph
sub_paragraph.default: 'Ready to experience premium wholesale produce? Reach out to the AMJ Produce team and we''ll take care of the rest.'

form_note.name: form_note
form_note.default: 'We typically respond within one business day.'

commitment_paragraph.name: commitment_paragraph
commitment_paragraph.default: 'AMJ Produce Co. aim to be South Australia''s wholesale distributor of choice for fresh fruits and vegetables. Driven by the Guiding Principles: ''Quality Products, Fast Service and Fair Pricing.'' and in all our business relationships by the basic values of integrity, honesty, trustworthiness and excellence in customer service.'
